title: Set up the project repository
description: Initialize the Git repository, create frontend and backend folders, and configure the development environment.

title: Design the REST API endpoints
description: Plan and document all CRUD endpoints for the /todos resource following RESTful conventions.

title: Implement Express backend
description: Build the Node.js server with Express, configure CORS, add route handlers, and wire up JSON file persistence.

title: Build React frontend
description: Create the multi-page React application with React Router, including the Todo List page and Todo Detail page.

title: Write comprehensive README
description: Document the project overview, features, folder structure, installation steps, API endpoints, and assumptions.
